race.comment: NORDIC STRIKE (4) showed good early dash when resuming last start and held on well to finish 1.5 lengths back in second over 1000m at this track. Better for that and will be hard to run down from out wide for Jabez Johnstone. BEHAVIOUR (2) was out of the money when resuming from a spell last start over 975m at Swan Hill, beaten 4.5 lengths. Second up record is sound and his best is good enough. SOJU (6) has been okay her past couple and is in the each-way mix. ELECTRIC STAR (3) had been racing well until being safely held last start when 11 lengths away at Mornington. Has claims if she can reproduce her win at Caulfield Heath two starts back.
